hero.title: NELLO ONE
hero.subtitle: The path begins within.
hero.description: A guided self-discovery system powered by personality science and AI.

what_is.title: What is NELLO ONE?
what_is.description: NELLO ONE is an intelligent self-discovery platform that combines scientifically grounded personality tests, emotional design and AI-guided insights to reveal who you are and how you function — with clarity and simplicity.

miguel.title: Meet Miguel
miguel.subtitle: Your Inner Guide
miguel.description: Miguel analyzes your test results, identifies your core patterns, explains your emotional and behavioral tendencies, and helps you build clarity about who you are. With calm guidance, he walks with you through your entire self-discovery process.

tests.title: The 7 Professional Tests
tests.description: Accurate, professional tests translated into a simple and intuitive visual experience.

map.title: Your Self-Map, All in One Place
map.description: An integrated visual map that combines all your results into a simple, deep, meaningful overview.
map.coming_soon: Coming soon to the NELLO ONE experience.

clarity.title: Clarity
clarity.description: See yourself with simple, objective explanations.

identity.title: Identity
identity.description: Understand your tendencies, strengths and patterns.

direction.title: Direction
direction.description: Receive insights to improve relationships, decisions and emotions.

science.title: Science + AI
science.description: The best of personality science, explained by a human-like AI.

experience.title: Beautiful Experience
experience.description: A calm, modern, minimalist design that feels good to use.

journey.title: Guided Journey
journey.description: Step-by-step self-discovery with Miguel by your side.

pricing.label: Investment
pricing.title: Choose your path
pricing.subtitle: Start for free with the Archetypes Test or unlock your complete journey.
pricing.bundle_description: All 7 tests + your personalized AI-generated NELLO ONE Map. The complete self-knowledge experience.

footer.instant_access: After payment confirmation, you receive instant access to the tests.
